title: Draconic Spellbooks
description: A magical addon combining draconic power with powerful spellbooks and arcane progression.
body:
# Draconic Spellbooks

Draconic Spellbooks is a magical addon for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks that adds powerful draconic magic, high-tier spellbooks, advanced magical equipment, and fusion-crafted arcane technology inspired by Draconic Evolution.

This mod introduces a new Draco magic school focused on destructive dragon power, mobility, defense, and endgame progression.

## Features

- Powerful draconic spellbooks
- High-tier magical equipment
- Draco magic school
- Custom dragon-themed spells
- Dragon Flight mobility abilities
- Magical defensive abilities
- Energy infused spellcasting
- Fusion crafting integration
- Draconic rings and spellbook modules
- Custom 3D models and textures
- Endgame magic progression
- Advanced draconic artifacts
- Arcane technology and chaos energy

## Included Spellbooks

- Draconic Spellbook
- Awakened Draconium Spellbook
- Chaos Spellbook

## Spells

- Dragon Flight
- Mini Draco Turret
- Dragon Skin

## Integration

Designed to fully integrate with:

- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
- Draconic Evolution
